main.name: Jake Zembrzuski
main.description: looking for a full time position as a full stack or back-end developer
main.bio: I am a graduate of the College of Saint Rose with a B.S. in Computer Science and a minor in Mathematics. I have worked as a full time developer for the NYS Dept of Education and interned for the Dept. of ITS. I have a wide variety of skills using various technologies which you can learn more about below. This resume website was created using React.
main.contactmessage: Here is where you should write your message to readers to have them get in contact with you.

resume.skillmessage: Here you can create a short write-up of your skills to show off to employers

education.description: Algorithms, Programming Languages, Software Engineering, Internet Programming, Operating Systems, Unix with C, Computer Networks, Database Management, Data Structures, Microcomputer Architecture, Discrete Math, Calculus III

work.title: IT Specialist II Programming
work.description: I developed and maintained the State Aid Management System, which is written in JAVA, SQL, and STRUTS 1. I would analyze, troubleshoot, test, maintain, and deploy the application and assured systems and procedures were appropriately documented. I also provided input to Java architecture discussions and shared Java knowledge with staff.

work.company: New York State Dept of ITS
work.title: Junior Developer
work.description: I converted a Perl web application to Java and collaborated with a team on the project to meet deadlines. I responded to and resolved user reported issues and created and presented potential solutions to problems while utilizing a wide variety of technologies such as Hibernate, Maven, and Git

projectss.title: Emulated Oprating System Using Java
projectss.description: I created a mock linux shell using machine code along with context switching for CPU scheduling written in Java. I also implemented a GUI showing real-time memory usage.

projectss.title: Developed charity volunteer website using Angular.js
projectss.description: I worked on front end development for a volunteer website used to track and organize events for potential charities. I utilized Angular and Bootstrap to implement features such as event scheduling/tracking, permissions handling with different types of user accounts, and easily accessible UI design.
